operator_instances.transformation_goal: Increase computational complexity by requiring the function to read compound-specific bounds from the model instead of using hardcoded defaults.
operator_instances.rationale: The original task uses default bounds for all compounds. To make it more realistic, we add a data attribute to the model that provides per-compound bounds, and the function must handle this, including fallback defaults. This adds conditional logic and data extraction.

new_hidden_tests.description: Check that xij variables use compound-specific bounds when available.
new_hidden_tests.call_code:
prob, v, zi, dgri, xij, compounds = make_tmfa_problem(model_with_bounds, solver)
expected_lower_A = -10
expected_upper_A = 10
expected_lower_B = -20
expected_upper_B = 20
assert xij.vars[('A',)]['lower'] == expected_lower_A, f"xij['A'] lower bound mismatch"
assert xij.vars[('A',)]['upper'] == expected_upper_A
assert xij.vars[('B',)]['lower'] == expected_lower_B
assert xij.vars[('B',)]['upper'] == expected_upper_B
# Also test fallback if compound not in bounds
model_no_bounds = MetabolicModel()
del model_no_bounds.compound_bounds
prob2, v2, zi2, dgri2, xij2, compounds2 = make_tmfa_problem(model_no_bounds, solver)
assert xij2.vars[('A',)]['lower'] == -50, "Fallback lower bound failed"
assert xij2.vars[('A',)]['upper'] == 50

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that the function uses compound-specific bounds from the model when available, falling back to defaults.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: The function must access model.compound_bounds and apply the per-compound lower and upper bounds for xij variables; if the attribute does not exist or compound not in dictionary, use default (-50,50).
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Function hardcodes lower=-50 and upper=50 for all compounds, ignoring compound_bounds.

expected_behavior.criteria: xij.vars[compound]['lower'] == model.compound_bounds[compound][0] and xij.vars[compound]['upper'] == model.compound_bounds[compound][1] for compounds in model.compound_bounds; for compounds not in dictionary, fallback to -50 and 50.

semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Create a MetabolicModel with compound_bounds set to {'A': (-10,10), 'B': (-20,20)}. Run make_tmfa_problem and verify xij variable bounds match. Also test removal of attribute to verify fallback.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the new requirement: concentration variable bounds should be sourced from model.compound_bounds if present.
